title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 9 - 2017: Buena Vista Backdrop Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle films a redo of a vlog after discovering the original had no audio. He shows off his LARP/fantasy warrior gear (broadsword, shield, greaves, daggers) in his new green screen setup, then responds to a viewer request to discuss Buena Vista, Colorado, which he maps onto his personal 'Boulder Rome' interdimensional mythology, comparing Buena Vista's past as a 'hillbilly' cruising town to the ancient Samnites being civilized by Rome.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Used to be a backward hillbilly cruising town, now hipsterized/artisanal thanks to front-range colonization — analogous to Samnites being civilized by Rome
His family (Sacred Seer lineage) is uniquely allowed to dress as warriors even without warrior status in Boulder Rome
Classifies himself as 'commuter class' (not yet a warrior) because he bikes ~19 mph, short of the 20 mph threshold
